text: I failed out of school three times before I started to take Adderall. University once and a local college twice, in two different programs. Went back and my grades went from D's and F's to B's. I was able to concentrate and retain information. I don't have the fatigue, I had and I want to get the day going, instead of laying in bed for as long as I could. Literally changed my life. Insomnia, dry mouth, appetite loss. 30mg slow release in the morning.
